def negative_python_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_template_compile_for_unused_views():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_lazy_loading_eager_template_compile_for_unused_views"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Lazy loading. Flag compiling templates for disabled or rarely used views during startup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
